prompt: Create a dynamic cinematic anime illustration of a confident young man leaping high between modern skyscrapers, viewed from an extreme low-angle perspective as if the camera is near street level looking upward. He is mid-jump with one knee raised toward the viewer, the sole of his black dress shoe large in the foreground, one arm flung wide and the other fist clenched, smiling with fearless excitement. He has tousled dark curly hair, expressive eyes, and a heroic youthful face. His outfit consists of exactly 5 main clothing pieces: a flowing bright red open coat, a dark navy shirt, a loose golden yellow necktie whipping in the wind, tailored blue trousers, and polished black shoes, with a belt and wrist accessories as small details. The red coat billows dramatically like a cape. Set the scene in a dense glass-and-steel downtown district under a vivid blue summer sky filled with bright cumulus clouds. Include exactly 6 prominent environmental elements: tall glass skyscraper on the left, tall reflective skyscraper on the right, shorter tower cluster at the bottom left, distant high-rise at the bottom right, a construction crane in the lower-left sky, and scattered golden leaves or paper fragments flying through the air. Use strong sunlight, crisp highlights, lens-like sparkle, deep shadows under the figure, motion blur on the buildings near the edges, and dramatic foreshortening. Style: high-budget Japanese anime key visual, ultra-detailed linework, vibrant saturated colors, cinematic composition, energetic optimism, vertical 3:4 canvas, no text, no logo, no watermark.
